texto: The golden rule of business is supply and demand. I venture to say that this is also the rule of happiness. When a balance is achieved between our desires and another's willingness to satisfy them, the result is a sympathetic, mutually rewarding relationship. (...) a thriving economy of love.' - character Mike Lambeth
explicacao: Citação de Caroline Adderson sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The golden rule of business is supply and demand. I venture to say that this is also the rule of …” articula sucesso, desire, happiness em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como happiness e love.
